studyName: METSIM Subcutaneous Adipose Needle Biopsy RNA-Seq

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample ID, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, biopsy type, multiple samples from the same subject with METSIM needle biopsies or with FUSION adipose, if genotype available in METSIM parent study, if samples are included in PMID:37647564, PMID:31564431, and/or PMID:34995504 and AdipoExpress publication, RNA integrity number, median of deletions across reads calculated using RSeQC, median of insertions across reads and mean of read 1 and read 2 calculated using RSeQC, and RNA-sequencing batch.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BIOPSY_TYPE
variables.description: Type of biopsy

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: DELETION_SIZE
variables.description: Median of deletions across reads calculated using RSeQC

variables.name: HAS_GENOTYPE
variables.description: Has genotype available in METSIM parent study

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: INSERTION_SIZE_MEAN_R1R2
variables.description: Median of insertions across reads and mean of read 1 and read 2 calculated using RSeQC

variables.name: IS_PUBLISHED_N426
variables.description: The sample is included in PMID: 34995504 (Brotman and Raulerson et al., 2022, AJHG) and AdipoExpress publication

variables.name: IS_PUBLISHED_N434
variables.description: The sample is included in PMID: 37647564 (Brotman et al., 2023, Diabetes) and PMID: 31564431 (Raulerson et al., 2019)

variables.name: IS_SHARED_FUSION
variables.description: Multiple samples from the same subject with FUSION adipose

variables.name: IS_SHARED_METSIM_SURGICAL
variables.description: Multiple samples from the same subject with METSIM needle biopsies

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: RIN
variables.description: RNA integrity number

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_BATCH
variables.description: RNA-sequencing batch

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject ID, race, and estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach (n= 11 variables; Adipocyte, Endothelial, Fibroblast, Mast, Preadipocyte, Perivascular, Macrophage, T_naive, T_NK, B, and Neutrophil).

variables.name: Adipocyte
variables.description: Estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach

variables.name: B
variables.description: Estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach

variables.name: Endothelial
variables.description: Estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach

variables.name: Fibroblast
variables.description: Estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach

variables.name: Macrophage
variables.description: Estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach

variables.name: Mast
variables.description: Estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach

variables.name: Neutrophil
variables.description: Estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach

variables.name: Perivascular
variables.description: Estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach

variables.name: Preadipocyte
variables.description: Estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Race

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: T_NK
variables.description: Estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach

variables.name: T_naive
variables.description: Estimated cell-type proportions from SCDC tree-based approach

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study sample IDs and GEO accession IDs.

variables.name: GEO_ACCESSION
variables.description: GEO accession ID (GSM#)

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID
